name: · ☽ Aamon Paxley ☾ ·
description:
Darkness is not the absence of light — it is the presence of something far older. It breathes beneath the skin of the world, waiting for the weak to call its name. Evil is not born; it awakens when men forget their fear.

...

It whispers promises of freedom, yet binds the soul tighter with every breath.

...

In the end, even the bravest hearts kneel before the shadow,

...

for there is a strange peace in surrendering to the inevitable.
creator: vaekid
